recent_form_summary: Mixed grass swing: routine win over Atmane, hard-fought 3-set win over Cilic, then an R1 exit to Auger-Aliassime at Halle. 2026 record 14-18.
stat_trend_summary: Highly volatile ace counts this swing (2, 13, 5), making the trend hard to project against a 6.5 line.
opponent_factor_summary: Mannarino trails the H2H 0-2 (on hard/clay) and isn't an elite returner -- a mild positive, though his grass instincts could extend rallies either way.
notes: Recent ace totals (2, 13, 5) average right around the line but show high variance and a recent R1 loss -- unstable form heading into a tougher seeded opponent.
